_notes: Source: hemas-encounter (hospital admissions). Target: US Core Encounter. Both require identifier, type (min=1), subject (min=1). Source has hospital-specific extensions (bedNumber, wardName, attendingConsultant), mandatory participant, mandatory reasonCode, and hemas-specific VS bindings. Target adds identifier sub-element constraints, us-core-encounter-type binding, participant.period MS, reasonReference MS, hospitalization.dischargeDisposition preferred binding (us-core), and constrains serviceProvider to us-core-organization. Source has 3 error constraints not in US Core.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [hemas-enc-1 (error: finished status implies period.end required), hemas-enc-2 (warning: emergency class implies priority required), hemas-enc-3 (error: inpatient class implies location required)]. US Core Encounter has no root-level constraints.
Optional extension bedNumber[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension wardName[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension attendingConsultant[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.

Source identifier slicing removed in target: source has named slice admissionNumber[1..1 mustSupport=true] with type[1..* patternCC(VN)], system[1..1], value[1..1]; US Core adds general identifier.system[1..1 mustSupport=true] and identifier.value[1..1 mustSupport=true] instead with no named slices.
Source mandatory identifier slice admissionNumber[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent named identifier slice in US Core Encounter.

identifier.system constraint changed: source constrains system only within admissionNumber slice [1..1 mustSupport=true]; target adds identifier.system[1..1 mustSupport=true] at general identifier level. Effective result is same mandatory constraint but applied differently.

identifier.value constraint changed: source constrains value only within admissionNumber slice [1..1 mustSupport=true]; target adds identifier.value[1..1 mustSupport=true] at general identifier level.

Encounter.type binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-encounter-type). Different value sets, same binding strength.

serviceType MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true extensible:https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/service-type; US Core does not constrain serviceType. MS removed and source binding removed.

priority MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true extensible:https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-priority; US Core does not constrain priority. MS removed and source binding removed.
subject reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Patient; target constrains to us-core-patient. Different profile targets.
participant cardinality relaxed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=true] (US Core no explicit min). Min decreased. MustSupport preserved.
participant.period MustSupport added in target: US Core adds participant.period[mustSupport=true]; source does not constrain participant.period. MS added on optional element.

participant.individual reference target changed: source has no target profile constraint on individual; target constrains to [us-core-practitioner, us-core-practitionerrole, us-core-relatedperson]. New profile targets added.
reasonCode cardinality relaxed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=true] (US Core no explicit min). Min decreased. MustSupport preserved.

New reasonReference[0..* mustSupport=true] added in target with reference targets [us-core conditions, us-core-procedure, Observation, ImmunizationRecommendation]. Source does not constrain reasonReference.

diagnosis.use binding changed: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/diagnosis-role); US Core does not constrain diagnosis.use (no binding in target differential). Source binding removed in target.

hospitalization.dischargeDisposition binding changed: source extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/discharge-disposition) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-discharge-disposition). Different value sets; strength weakened from extensible to preferred.

hospitalization.admitSource MustSupport removed and binding removed: source mustSupport=true extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/admit-source); US Core does not constrain hospitalization.admitSource. MS removed and source binding removed.
hospitalization.preAdmissionIdentifier MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain preAdmissionIdentifier. MS removed from optional element.
hospitalization.dietPreference MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain dietPreference. MS removed from optional element.
location.status MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain location.status. MS removed from optional element.
serviceProvider reference target changed: source constrains to hemas/Organization; target constrains to us-core-organization. Different profile targets.
serviceProvider cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (US Core no explicit min). Min decreased. MustSupport preserved.
period cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (US Core no explicit min on period). Min decreased. MustSupport preserved.
period.start MustSupport removed on required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true]; US Core does not constrain period.start. Min decreased and MS removed.
